title: centaurea inexpugnabilis
intro: Centaurea inexpugnabilis, also known as the 'Diffuse Thistle', is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Centaurea inexpugnabilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. Centaurea inexpugnabilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, flowers, and roots can be used in various herbal preparations, such as salves and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
